creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-LJ-TextMessage/
#	p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-plist
#	p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-descr
#	p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-comment
#	p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo
#	p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile
#
echo c - p5-LJ-TextMessage/
mkdir -p p5-LJ-TextMessage/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-plist << 'END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-plist'
Xlib/perl5/5.00503/man/man3/LJ::TextMessage.3
Xlib/perl5/site_perl/5.005/LJ/TextMessage.pm
X
END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-plist
echo x - p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-descr << 'END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-descr'
XLJ::TextMessage - text message phones/pages using a variety of methods/services 
X
XWWW: http://livejournal.com/code/textmessage/
END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-descr
echo x - p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-comment << 'END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-comment'
XLJ::TextMessage - text message phones/pages using a variety of methods/services 
X
END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/pkg-comment
echo x - p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo << 'END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo'
XMD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.2.tar.gz) = d4444eed0a88295f58d7620217671069
END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo
echo x - p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-LJ-TextMessage
X# Date created:				25 Mar 2001
X# Whom:	      				Michael Johnson <ahze@ahze.net>
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	LJ-TextMessage
XPORTVERSION=	1.2
XCATEGORIES=	perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	http://livejournal.com/files/code/textmessage/ \
X		ftp://ftp.livejournal.com/code/textmessage/ 
X		
X
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	ahze@ahze.net
X
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile
exit
